characters.name: Jack Smith
characters.description: Jack Smithis a character mentioned in the episode "The Skeleton Cowboy" of the television seriesMona the Vampire. In the episode,Mona Parkerwent into the police department and outlandishly claimed toOfficer Halcroft, the local police chief, thatBuckskin Bill, a character from a local legend, was back in town and has rustled all of the horses that were previously on the local carousel. After this, Officer Halcroft mentioned Jack Smith when he said that the horses are likely with Jack Smith, who had also probably placed a new coat of paint onto the horses. Because of this, it can be assumed that Jack Smith probably has a career related to painting. The writers of the episode gave this character the name "Jack Smith" simply because the name rhymes with the wordblacksmith. The writers used this rhyme scheme for the moment when, during Mona's moment of imagination, had misheard Officer Halcroft at first thinking that he said that "those horses are probably at the blacksmith's", when he actually said "Jack Smith's". In the episode,Mona Parkerwent into the police department and outlandishly claimed toOfficer Halcroft, the local police chief, thatBuckskin Bill, a character from a local legend, was back in town and has rustled all of the horses that were previously on the local carousel. After this, Officer Halcroft mentioned Jack Smith when he said that the horses are likely with Jack Smith, who had also probably placed a new coat of paint onto the horses. Because of this, it can be assumed that Jack Smith probably has a career related to painting.

After this, Officer Halcroft mentioned Jack Smith when he said that the horses are likely with Jack Smith, who had also probably placed a new coat of paint onto the horses. Because of this, it can be assumed that Jack Smith probably has a career related to painting.

characters.name: Melvin
characters.description: Melvin is the toddler cousin of Mona, he's a two year old toddler who is a total menace. Melvin has messy red hair and freckles on his cheeks, he's dressed in a red long sleeve shirt with the sleeves rolled up and blue overalls and brown toddler shoes, he has two teeth that always stick out regardless if his mouth is open or closes and he carries a red and yellow lollipop that's often stuck to him. MelvinBackground informationTelevision programsmona the vampireCharacter informationOccupationtoddlerAlignmentgoodAffiliationsmonaRelativesPatty (Mother)Mona (cousin)Veronica Parker (Aunt)Lenny Parker (Uncle)AlliesMona, Charlie, FangLikesMona, Charlie, drawing, running, playing, lollipops, cats, storiesQuoteNO!Source

characters.name: Miss Gotto
characters.description: Miss GottoBackground informationTelevision programsMona the VampireVoiceJennifer SeguinCharacter informationFull nameMadeleine GottoAppearanceSlender, rosy cheeks, fair skin, red hair, purple earrings, yellow hair bow, black eyes, green long-sleeved shirt, yellow collar, purple skirt and black shoes.OccupationMona's teacherAlignmentBad, later goodGoalTo teach Mona (formerly)HomeLondonRelativesRoberta Gotto (sister)AlliesMona the VampireEnemiesMona the Vampire(formerly)LikesHer students completing their homework (formerly)DislikesMona's vampire nonsense, her students not completing their homework (formerly)Source Madeleine Gotto, often shortened toMiss GottoorMs. Gotto, isMona's teacher at St. Faith's Elementary and the main antagonist ofMona the Vampire. Miss Gotto was shown to be a typical teacher: stern, demanding high standards of her students, and no-nonsense. Hence, she is often exasperated by Mona's strange ideas and arguments for supernatural occurrences that are ordinary events, and is quick to enforce discipline whenever Mona's imagination runs wild and affects her schoolwork.

characters.description: Officer Halcroftredirects here. For Officer Halcroft's doppelganger from the episodeThe Devious Doppelganger, seeOfficer Halcroft (doppelganger). Officer HalcroftBackground informationTelevision programsMona the VampireVoiceGary Jewell(seasons 1-3 and some episodes of season 4)Richard Dumont(other episodes of season 4)Character informationAppearanceSlender, silver hair, fair skin, dark red glasses, light blue police uniform, grey police badge, black boots, blue police cap and blue jeans.AlignmentGoodGoalPatrolling the townHomeLondon(formerly)Burma(currently)Source Officer Halcroftis the chief of local police ofMona's town. He's become used to Mona's antics, and is quick to offer a more rational explanation to Mona's stories, which, ironically, Mona finds rather outlandish and unbelievable.
